headline: FIND DATA GAPS BEFORE INSPECTORS DO
subheading: A senior QP guide to applying ALCOA+ across audit trails, access and records.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical data integrity and ALCOA+ GMP audit trails, set in deep navy. A luminous teal and cyan ribbon of flowing data threads through the scene like a traceable data lifecycle, weaving past a glowing magnifier lens that focuses on a single illuminated record node, surrounded by faint floating timestamp markers, chained record links and a layered audit-trail timeline rendered as stacked translucent glass strata. Subtle locked-padlock and fingerprint motifs suggest attributable, secure access and segregation of duties, while interconnected nodes imply electronic records, instruments and hybrid systems. A single fresh-green accent glow marks one verified, trustworthy data point amid the cool palette. Brushed-steel and frosted-glass surfaces, shallow depth of field with elegant bokeh, clinical-luxury mood of precision, traceability and trust. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
